perks.name: Conditioning
perks.description: You've accustomed yourself to using heavy armor.

perks.name: Relentless Onslaught
perks.description: After extensive training you now can sprint in heavy armor without problems.

perks.name: Combat Casting
perks.description: You are able to keep concentrated enough in heavy armor.

perks.name: Combat Training
perks.description: You are less hindered by your armor and can attack with ease.

perks.name: Battle Mage
perks.description: You have mastered spellcasting while wearing heavy armor.
